events.title: Denali in Full View
events.thought: At 20,310 feet, Denali doesn't care about Waldo. And yet Waldo cannot look away. There is a humility that comes with being a small truck next to the largest thing in North America.
events.status: Clear skies. Pulled over for 40 minutes. No regrets.

events.title: Wild Camp — Nenana River Corridor
events.thought: Waldo is parked on gravel 50 feet from the Nenana River. The sound is extraordinary. There is no cell signal and Starlink is pointed through a spruce canopy. This is fine. This is the point.
events.status: Camped 2100. River: 15ft, fast. Bears: theoretically present.
